arms_mandatory_baselines: target-task-family content-word token mass (the denominator; stratified by domain)

dependent_vars.definition: content-word tokens with a plausible profile-1 explication at this rung
dependent_vars.name: n_covered

dependent_vars.definition: content-word tokens sampled from the target task family (planned 2000/rung)
dependent_vars.name: n_tokens_sampled

dependent_vars.definition: human spot-check agreements over n=100 machine coverage judgments (GATE-H)
dependent_vars.name: spot_check_agree

n_planned.niche_scope_default: X = 20% of the target task family's content-word mass (pre-declared GNG-0 ratification default, P7 second-pass list; maintainer may reset X at GNG-0 signing)

endpoints.test: coverage fraction at the primary rung (molecules-v0) vs the pre-declared NICHE-SCOPE threshold X=0.20, one-sided α=0.05, verdict read from the Wilson 95% bounds (clear / not clear / between = INCONCLUSIVE)
per-rung coverage fractions reported (kernel-v0 / molecules-v0 / wn31-aligned); descriptive, F-explore

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: M0b has no P1 §4b row: coverage is corpus-indexed, not model-indexed. The measured coverage number extrapolates to NO other corpus or rung; it is restated verbatim with its rung in every later verdict (P2 G-7) and re-measured as the kernel grows (coverage-growth curve, P7 RT-11/§10).
kill_criterion_verbatim: P3 §1.1 m0b.gate consequence (RT-7, verbatim): 'coverage < X ⇒ every verdict template renders a NICHE-SCOPE banner and any frontier-pitch route must carry an explicit coverage-growth cost line — a gate with a consequence, not just disclosure.' Pre-declared default X = 20% of the target task family's content-word mass (GNG-0 ratification default, P7 second-pass verification list). FAIL here binds the NICHE-SCOPE banner; it does not stop Tier-1 (P1 §5: none of Tier 0 blocks Tier 1, but GATE-T1 requires m0b.close + m0b.gate evaluated).

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/
corpus_hashes.task-family-token-sample: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:m0b.inputs (target task family text sample + stratification; ops amendment before any final-phase run)

title: M0b — kernel-expressibility coverage measurement + NICHE-SCOPE gate (P1 §5 required pre-experiment gate; P2 G-7: the number every later verdict restates; not itself a hypothesis)
